What Happened

Major events, music, film, tech & prices from 1921

The World in 1921
🌍EventsWarren Harding inaugurated as 29th US President (Mar 4) · Tulsa Race Massacre destroys Black Wall Street (May 31) · US signs separate peace treaties with Germany and Austria (Aug) · Ireland partitioned; Irish Free State created (Dec) · Insulin first used to treat diabetes patient (Oct) · Washington Naval Conference opens to limit arms (Nov 12)
🎵MusicAin't We Got Fun – Billy Jones & Ernest Hare
🎬FilmThe Kid
💻TechFrederick Banting and Charles Best discovered insulin as a diabetes treatment
🛒PricesBread $0.10 · Gas $0.26/gal · House $3,600

What major events happened in 1921?

1921 was a year of significant world events that shaped history. From political upheavals to cultural milestones, the year left a lasting mark on society. The music charts, cinema screens, and technological landscape of 1921 reflect the era's unique character. Prices for everyday goods like bread, gasoline, and homes give a vivid snapshot of the economic climate of the time.

Why is 1921 historically significant?

Each year carries its own defining moments and cultural touchstones. 1921 contributed unique chapters to the story of the 20th and 21st centuries. Whether you lived through 1921 or are researching it, the events, art, technology, and everyday costs of that year paint a rich picture of life at the time.

Frequently asked questions

What major events happened in 1921?

Major world events of 1921 include: Warren Harding inaugurated as 29th US President (Mar 4); Tulsa Race Massacre destroys Black Wall Street (May 31); US signs separate peace treaties with Germany and Austria (Aug); Ireland partitioned; Irish Free State created (Dec).

What was the #1 song in 1921?

The most iconic song of 1921 was Ain't We Got Fun – Billy Jones & Ernest Hare.

What was the top film in 1921?

The standout film of 1921 was The Kid.

What did things cost in 1921?

In 1921, a loaf of bread cost $0.10, gasoline was $0.26/gal, and the average house was $3,600.

What technology milestone happened in 1921?

Frederick Banting and Charles Best discovered insulin as a diabetes treatment

Source Wikipedia – 1921
